title: anthemis carpatica var. macedonica
intro: Anthemis carpatica var. macedonica, also known as Macedonian chamomile, is a subspecies of Anthemis carpatica that originates from the mountainous regions of Macedonia. This plant is a member of the daisy family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anthemis carpatica var. macedonica include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation and sleep, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it is often used in traditional medicine to calm the mind and body.
